pinyin: jun1 zi3 yi1 yan2 , si4 ma3 nan2 zhui1
defs: a nobleman's word is his bond (proverb)

pinyin: jun1 zi3 bu4 ji4 xiao3 ren2 guo4
defs: see 大人不記小人過|大人不记小人过[da4 ren2 bu4 ji4 xiao3 ren2 guo4]
friendship between gentlemen, insipid as water (idiom, from Zhuangzi 莊子|庄子[Zhuang1 zi3])

pinyin: jun1 zi3 zhi1 jiao1 dan4 ru2 shui3
defs: a gentleman's friendship, insipid as water (idiom, from Zhuangzi 莊子|庄子[Zhuang1 zi3])

pinyin: jun1 zi3 dong4 kou3 bu4 dong4 shou3
defs: a gentleman uses his mouth and not his fist

trad: 君子坦蕩蕩，小人長戚戚
simp: 君子坦荡荡，小人长戚戚
pinyin: jun1 zi5 tan3 dang4 dang4 , xiao3 ren2 chang2 qi1 qi1
defs: good people are at peace with themselves, (but) there is no rest for the wicked

pinyin: jun1 zi5 bao4 chou2 , shi2 nian2 bu4 wan3
defs: lit. for a nobleman to take revenge, ten years is not too long (idiom)
fig. revenge is a dish best served cold
lit. a nobleman stays clear of the kitchen (idiom, from Mencius)
fig. a nobleman who has seen a living animal cannot bear to see it die, hence he keeps away from the kitchen
see 君山區|君山区[Jun1 shan1 Qu1]
Junshan, a district of Yueyang City 岳陽市|岳阳市[Yue4 yang2 Shi4], Hunan
